name: NNDb-3T+ — Movie, Eye-Tracking & Cognitive Tasks
description: OpenNeuro dataset (ds006642) of 40 young adults combining naturalistic movie watching, eye-tracking, sensorimotor mapping, and cognitive tasks at 3T. An extension of the Naturalistic Neuroimaging Database for multimodal naturalistic research.
citation: Levchenko A, et al. (2025). NNDb-3T+: a neuroimaging database combining movie-watching, eye-tracking, sensorimotor mapping, and cognitive tasks. bioRxiv.
